prompt: We are about to ship this. Please review our auth code for security problems and grade it.

assertions.name: no-fail-on-denylist
assertions.text: The OWASP-style jti denylist revocation model is not reported as a failure (advisory at most)

assertions.name: recognizes-rotation
assertions.text: Report acknowledges that rotation and reuse detection with family revocation are present and correct

assertions.name: finds-tier3-gaps
assertions.text: Report notes at least one real Tier 3 gap: refresh cookie not path-scoped, or no rate limiting on the refresh endpoint

assertions.name: grade-a-or-b
assertions.text: Overall grade is A or B (with-skill run only)

assertions.name: no-confirmed-false-positives
assertions.text: No finding is reported as a confirmed failure (nothing failure-worthy is seeded)
